items.title: One part of summer league I really enjoy is chatting with the guys who probably will never wear a Sixers jersey again.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
One part of summer league I really enjoy is chatting with the guys who probably will never wear a Sixers jersey again. 

You learn some fun things, like how Issac “Big Fish” Johnson had an NIL deal on a Swedish Fish milkshake with a local fast food chain while at Utah State 

More nuggets👇🏻

items.title: There are many understandable reasons why this project has been delayed so long, but the absolute contempt with which Sky ownership has responded to every concern about their construction timeline becomes more and more baffling with each delay.
items.author: Julia Poe
items.body_excerpt:
There are many understandable reasons why this project has been delayed so long, but the absolute contempt with which Sky ownership has responded to every concern about their construction timeline becomes more and more baffling with each delay.

The new November end date is a full year’s delay.
